emails.subject: Deleting FSP Strips
emails.body: Deleting FSP Strips Kroum, Users are having difficulty deleting term strips in Deal Entry due to the existence of deal_strip_setlmt_ext records. Is Deal Entry supposed to delete these records explicitly or are we supposed to have a trigger in place to handle this? Thanks, Will

emails.subject: Deleting FSP Strips

emails.subject: RE: Deleting FSP Strips
emails.body: RE: Deleting FSP Strips All ext tables should be deleted by triggers Enpower-PWR#401 Tantra said the triggers are in TESTN, I can not see them because of my permissions. I can trace the problem if I get more info which is the database instance and what is the error message. Thanks, Kroum
